name: Salmon with Yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Slather the yogurt over both sides and edges of the salmon.
2. Roll in soft bread crumbs and spices of your choice.
3. Place in a preheated oven or broil about 6 inches from the flame or grill until cooked through.
4. Turn off the heat once done. This was moist and flavorful and low in calories. Can be used with any thick cut of fish, such as swordfish or halibut. Enjoy!!!
